result:
Both deliverables are committed (`081a8090448`) and pushed — the branch is in sync with `origin/llk_helper_library` (no `[ahead]` marker). The only uncommitted items are a pre-existing third-party submodule and pipeline-harness log state, neither of which I authored, so they're intentionally left untouched per the staging instructions.

## Work complete

**Delivered and committed:**
1. `ttnn/ttnn/operations/scaled_dot_product_attention/op_design.md` — Flash Attention SDPA design (272 lines)
2. `tests/ttnn/unit_tests/operations/scaled_dot_product_attention/test_scaled_dot_product_attention.py` — acceptance test (182 lines)

**Pipeline-managed, untouched:** `eval/golden_tests/scaled_dot_product_attention/feature_spec.py` (TILE-only universe, `INVALID=[]`).

The design pins down a fully helper-based Flash Attention pipeline where the `S_q × S_kv` score matrix is never materialized — score CBs are sized to a single `B_q × B_kv` block and the mask is applied block-by-block during the online-softmax recurrence (running max via `reduce<MAX>` + `Accumulate`, correction factor `α`, and deferred `1/l` normalization), with every compute phase mapped to a `kernel_lib` helper at a verified `file:line`.
